title: Houses for Rent in Solon, OH
metaTitle: Houses for Rent in Solon, Ohio
metaDescription: Looking for houses for rent in Solon, Ohio? Compare Cleveland-area rent ranges, transit access, and how to tell us what you're looking for.
answerBox: Solon, Ohio is a southeast Cuyahoga County suburb (ZIP 44139) along I-271 near State Route 91, bordering the South Chagrin Reservation. Rents across Greater Cleveland typically run $700-$1,800 a month. Solon isn't currently in our selection, but tell us your bedroom count and budget and we'll compare nearby options.

sections.h2: Renting a house in Solon, Ohio
body: Solon is a southeast Cuyahoga County suburb bordering Bainbridge Township in Geauga County to the east and Aurora in Portage County to the southeast, with **ZIP code 44139** covering the city. Interstate 271 runs through Solon with interchanges near State Route 91 (SOM Center Road) and State Route 422 (Aurora Road), and the Aurora Road corridor includes a number of corporate office and light-industrial parks alongside the city's residential subdivisions. Housing stock is largely newer suburban construction — single-family colonials and ranches built from the 1960s onward on larger lots than the older housing stock found in Cleveland proper.

**Rent Finder Cleveland works with 90+ voucher-friendly rental homes concentrated in Cleveland's east and southeast side neighborhoods, and Solon is not currently part of our selection.** If you're set on Solon specifically, a Solon-focused property manager or listing site will have more direct inventory. If your search is flexible on location, [tell us what you're looking for](/p/book-showing) — bedrooms, budget, and whether you hold a housing voucher — and we can point you to comparable options in the Cleveland neighborhoods we do work with.

sections.h2: What does it cost to rent in the Cleveland area?
body: Solon rents tend to run above the Cleveland city average given its newer housing stock, but as a general Greater Cleveland benchmark, Zumper's July 4, 2026 report puts the metro's median asking rent at **$1,250/month** overall, with 2-bedroom units around **$1,100** and 3-bedroom units around **$1,350**. RentCafe's July 2, 2026 report, which weights toward larger professionally-managed buildings, shows a higher metro average of **$1,564/month**. Actual Solon house rents will depend on the specific home, its size, and condition.

Solon sits along Interstate 271, with State Route 91 and State Route 422 (Aurora Road) providing the main east-west and north-south corridors through the city. South Chagrin Reservation, part of the Cleveland Metroparks system, borders Solon along its eastern edge, offering trails and river access along the Chagrin River. Greater Cleveland RTA's fixed bus routes are concentrated closer to the city and inner-ring suburbs, so most Solon residents rely on a car for daily transportation and for the commute toward downtown Cleveland.

items: **Highways:** I-271 near State Route 91 and State Route 422
**Location:** Southeast Cuyahoga County, bordering Bainbridge Township and Aurora

sections.h2: Section 8 and voucher holders looking in Solon
body: Ohio has no statewide law requiring landlords to accept Housing Choice Vouchers, and Solon is not among the handful of Cuyahoga County communities — Cleveland Heights, South Euclid, University Heights, Warrensville Heights, and Linndale — that have adopted local source-of-income protection ordinances, so acceptance in Solon depends on the individual landlord. The [Cuyahoga Metropolitan Housing Authority (CMHA)](https://www.cmha.net/housing/applicants/housing_choice_vouchers.php) administers the countywide Housing Choice Voucher program and accepts preliminary applications year-round. Every home Rent Finder Cleveland works with accepts Section 8 and is HUD-inspection-ready, though our current homes are concentrated in Cleveland rather than Solon — see our [Section 8 guide](/section-8-housing-cleveland-oh/) for how the program works locally.

If your search spans both Solon and Cleveland proper, our [houses for rent in Cleveland](/houses-for-rent-cleveland-oh/) pillar page covers the neighborhoods where we work with inventory today. You can also compare nearby [Beachwood](/cleveland-rentals/suburbs/houses-for-rent-beachwood-ohio/), or [tell us what you need](/p/book-showing) and we'll help you weigh it against homes we do work with.

faq.q: Does Rent Finder Cleveland works with houses in Solon, Ohio?
faq.a: Not currently. Our 90+ voucher-friendly rental homes are concentrated in Cleveland's east and southeast side neighborhoods, and Solon is outside our current selection. If you're flexible on location, tell us your bedroom count and budget and we'll point you to comparable options we do work with.

faq.q: How much does it cost to rent a house in Solon, Ohio?
faq.a: Solon-specific pricing varies by home and size, but as a Greater Cleveland benchmark, Zumper's July 2026 report shows a metro median of about $1,100 for 2-bedroom and $1,350 for 3-bedroom units, while RentCafe's July 2026 report runs higher for larger professionally-managed buildings.

faq.q: What ZIP code is Solon, Ohio in?
faq.a: Solon is ZIP code 44139, in southeast Cuyahoga County, bordering Bainbridge Township in Geauga County and Aurora in Portage County.

faq.q: Do Solon landlords accept Section 8 vouchers?
faq.a: It depends on the individual landlord. Ohio has no statewide law requiring voucher acceptance, and Solon is not among the small number of Cuyahoga County communities with a local source-of-income protection ordinance. CMHA administers the countywide Housing Choice Voucher program.

faq.q: How do I get from Solon to downtown Cleveland?
faq.a: Interstate 271 runs through Solon and connects toward downtown Cleveland. Greater Cleveland RTA's fixed-route bus network is concentrated closer to the city and inner-ring suburbs, so most Solon residents drive for the commute.
